clauses.burden: Limited license to use Trademarks solely in direct connection with sale of food/beverage at a single specified location
Fixed term (blank: typically 10 years for Express). Upon expiration: no expectation or right to continue, extend, renew, or replace the license.
clauses.trigger: Opening date or 45 days from execution, whichever earlier

clauses.burden: Company will use commercially reasonable efforts to furnish advice and assistance, including periodic visits — at franchisor's sole discretion based on licensee's experience and performance

Full time, best efforts, constant personal attention to day-to-day operations. Licensee or qualified manager must reside within ~1 hour driving time. Must keep restaurant open during hours specified in Manual.
Must faithfully, completely, and continuously perform all instructions, standards, specifications in the Manual (OneSource). Manual is incorporated by reference. Failure = material breach.
Company may revise, amend, delete from, and add to the System and Manual at any time. Licensee must promptly comply with all changes.
clauses.standard: Good faith, reasonable business judgment, overall best interests of system

clauses.burden: Any failure to adhere to standards, specifications, requirements or instructions in Agreement or Manual constitutes a MATERIAL BREACH.
Must offer all and only products in Manual. No other products, trademarks, or service marks without prior written consent.
System and Manual are trade secrets. No right to disclose, duplicate, license, sell, or reveal to any person except employees as needed. Must obtain employee confidentiality agreements.
Manual and all materials remain Company property. Must be returned immediately upon expiration or termination.
During term: no interest in similar business (Mexican-style food restaurant). Post-term (if terminated for breach): 1 year, 10-mile radius. Exception: up to 10% stock in publicly traded company.
clauses.severability: Court may modify to be valid and enforceable

clauses.burden: Company provides training to licensee + 1 manager. Tuition-free but licensee bears all travel, lodging, meals costs. Failure to complete = Company may terminate. Ongoing refresher courses required.
Maintain and repair Restaurant, equipment, signage at sole cost. Replace equipment as necessary or as reasonably required by Company. No alterations without prior written approval.

Must modernize/re-image Restaurant as reasonably required by Company. However, not required unless Company commits to implement standards in ≥25% of company-operated US units within current/following year.
Lease must contain provisions permitting licensee and Company to take actions under §15.2(b). Lessor must give Company notice of default/termination and opportunity to cure.
Period license fee (royalty) of 10% of Gross Sales. Payment by 5th business day after accounting period. Electronic payment via K-RISE.
clauses.note: Detailed in Item 6 of FDD body

clauses.burden: Must maintain complete and accurate books and records. Company has right to access and audit at any time.
Company may inspect Unit and audit books at any time. If audit reveals understated Gross Sales by 2%+, licensee pays all audit costs including legal fees.
Licensee indemnifies Company and affiliates from all claims, losses, liabilities, costs arising from licensee's operation.
Must obtain and maintain workers' comp, employer's liability, CGL, products liability, liquor liability, EPL, all-risk property insurance. Company may purchase on your behalf and charge costs.

All transfers require prior written consent. ROFR: Company has 30 days from receipt of binding agreement. Personal guarantee required from all equity holders (except spouse holding equity solely due to marriage).
Must use Trademarks strictly per Agreement. Cannot attack validity/ownership. All goodwill inures to IP Holder/Company. Must notify of any infringement claims immediately.

Company may terminate for any material breach. Voluntary termination by licensee = default. Non-curable defaults include untrained manager, denial of access, unauthorized transfer, loss of possession, felony, misrepresentation, bankruptcy, pattern of repeated defaults. 30-day cure for monetary/operational defaults.
Stop using Trademarks/System, de-identify Unit per required scope, return Manual and all materials. Company may require assignment of lease/premises interest.
If terminated for certain specified reasons: greater of $100,000 or 11% of Unit's Gross Sales for last 12 months of operation.
New York law applies.
Any suits must be brought in federal or state courts in Orange County, California.
Only terms of License Agreement and all agreements signed with it are binding (subject to state law).
All changes must be mutually agreed in writing (except changes to Manual/Trademarks) and signed by a Company officer.
Any default/breach of Agreement by Licensee, affiliates, or owners is deemed breach of any other agreement between parties.

distinctive_clauses.description: No re-imaging required unless Company commits to implement in ≥25% of company-operated US units. This is a protective provision for licensees.
Licensee cannot voluntarily exit without paying liquidated damages (min $100K). This is a significant trap for licensees in underperforming locations.
Entire agreement uses 'license' and 'licensee' rather than 'franchise' and 'franchisee'. This may affect legal protections in some states.

Company may assign agreement without restriction, but only to assignee willing and able to assume obligations. The securitization structure means the franchise agreement is pledged as collateral to note holders.

guaranty_scope.personal_guarantee: All legal and/or beneficial holders of equity must personally guarantee all obligations under License Agreement
guaranty_scope.spousal_exception: Spouse holding beneficial equity solely because of marriage is not required to execute personal guarantee

force_majeure.note: No force majeure clause identified in the License Agreement
